conservative.name: Transposition
conservative.requirements:
10 Power
You must have a clear view of the night sky to cast this spell

success.description: You and up to 1 other willing character per character rank vanish from your current location and appear in a new one, which may be anywhere int he world that is under the night sky. You appear near the spot you were aiming for, deviating no more that 5% of the total distance you have traveled

challenge.description: Special: If you have instruments for celestial observation and an accurate map marking the direction and distance to your destination, and you spend at least half an hour using them, remove from the dice pool. If your map is inaccurate, or you have no map, add instead. This spell recharges as sunset

delay.description: You vanish...but you don't reappear until the next night

You appear near the spot you were aiming for, deviating no more that 5% of the total distance you have traveled

If your map is inaccurate, or you have no map, add instead. This spell recharges as sunset

exertion.description: You and all your passengers suffer 1 wound
